svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram id="SP-IssuerApp-arch" name="SP-IssuerApplication Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="2138" dy="1159" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2100" pageHeight="1680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="cf_bg" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=28;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="CLOUDFLARE PLATFORM — SvelteKit + Workers + D1 SQLite → readiness.syndicatepath.com" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="2060" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cf_workers" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="Workers Runtime
SvelteKit adapter-cloudflare" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="230" x="40" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cf_d1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="Cloudflare D1 SQLite
5 tables — all app persistence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="230" x="290" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cf_env" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="ENV Bindings (Wrangler secrets)
AUTH_SECRET · RESEND_API_KEY · ANTHROPIC_API_KEY · N8N_WEBHOOK_URL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="390" x="540" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cf_score" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="lib/scoring/engine.ts

sendOtpEmail · sendSubmission* via Resend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="260" x="1530" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cf_wrangler" parent="1" style="rounded=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=center;" value="wrangler.toml + Migrations
schema/migrations/*.sql → wrangler d1 apply" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="240" x="1810" y="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="left_bg" parent="1"
